rounds: Lavendra with the full kit — necklace, black bag, Noskin loafers, people who actually know him — that was a clean win, no asterisk. Purple Country Road bag to the shops this week, caught the self-talk mid-spiral and went anyway — that one's huge because he did it conscious, not automatic. Pink jockstrap to Balmoral both weeks, changed into it in the men's room — the choice is landing even if the poncho's still on. But the Apollo ring and necklace at work? Dodged both, and he knows exactly why — pool nerves, ring fit, pendant reading as obviously gay. Named it clearly, which counts, but the round goes to them.
pattern: They're loudest around his own people and his own spaces — strangers at the shops got the purple bag no problem, but work and the swim group are still where they show teeth.
